hackathon: Microsoft AI Agents Hackathon | Multi-Agent Systems | $50K+
description: VeriFlow builds a deterministic agent orchestration layer on top of existing frameworks like AutoGen, replacing probabilistic LLM inference with verifiable state transitions. The system uses Circom circuits to generate Zero-Knowledge Proofs for each step in a multi-agent workflow, ensuring that the output of Agent A matches the input constraints of Agent B without exposing the raw data. Smart contracts on Ethereum serve as the settlement layer, verifying ZK proofs before releasing funds or updat
angle: Introduces 'Workflow State Hashing' to cryptographically prove an agent's multi-step execution path was deterministic and compliant without revealing the underlying logic or data.
